headline: Musk Asks Suppliers to Move at ‘Light Speed’ on New Chipmaking Plan
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk’s lieutenants have reached out to chip industry suppliers including Applied Materials Inc., Tokyo Electron Ltd. and Lam Research Corp. for his envisioned Terafab, early steps in an audacious and likely arduous attempt to break into the production of cutting-edge chips. Staff working for the joint venture between Tesla Inc. and SpaceX have sought price quotes and delivery times for an array of chipmaking gear, people familiar with the matter said. headline: Global Market for Computing and AI for Data Centers 2026-2040: AI ASICs is the Fastest-growing Processor Category, As Companies Including Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Meta Invest Heavily
summary: The "Global Market for Computing and AI for Data Centers 2026-2040" report highlights a booming semiconductor industry driven by generative AI, large language models, and AI ASICs. Nvidia leads GPU advancements, while custom silicon from hyperscalers like Google, Amazon, and Meta reshapes market dynamics. headline: E-Commerce Today - Shopify to Announce Q1 2026 Financial Results Soon
summary: Shopify Inc. has announced plans to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 5, ahead of market opening. As part of its announcement, Shopify will conduct a conference call to discuss these results, accessible via webcast in the Investor Relations section of its website. This development highlights the continuous monitoring of financial performance in the e-commerce sector, where Shopify’s platform plays a critical role in the online and offline sales infrastructure...

content.title: E-Commerce Today - Shopify to Announce Q1 2026 Financial Results Soon
content.summary: Shopify Inc. has announced plans to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 5, ahead of market opening. As part of its announcement, Shopify will conduct a conference call to discuss these results, accessible via webcast in the Investor Relations section of its website. This development highlights the continuous monitoring of financial performance in the e-commerce sector, where Shopify’s platform plays a critical role in the online and offline sales infrastructure...

headline: Markets are finally broadening out in 2026. Is that a problem?
summary: US stock futures (ES=F, NQ=F, YM=F) edge higher Thursday morning after the S&P 500 (^GSPC) and Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) closed yesterday's session at new record highs.  Morning Brief Anchor Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland examine the year-to-date moves across sectors and how the market indexes are holding up compared to their equal-weight counterparts.

content.title: Markets are finally broadening out in 2026. Is that a problem?
content.description:
US stock futures (ES=F, NQ=F, YM=F) edge higher Thursday morning after the S&P 500 (^GSPC) and Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) closed yesterday's session at new record highs.

Morning Brief Anchor Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland examine the year-to-date moves across sectors and how the market indexes are holding up compared to their equal-weight counterparts.
content.summary: US stock futures (ES=F, NQ=F, YM=F) edge higher Thursday morning after the S&P 500 (^GSPC) and Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) closed yesterday's session at new record highs. headline: Quantiphi Named First Preferred Amazon Quick SI Partner by AWS Generative AI Innovation Center
summary: Quantiphi, an AI-first digital engineering company, has been named as the First Preferred Amazon Quick Global SI Partner by the AWS Generative AI Innovation Center (GenAI IC) Partner Innovation Alliance (PIA), enabling Quantiphi to modernize data strategies with Agentic AI and transform enterprise productivity for customers worldwide.

headline: Q2 Announces Q2 Code, a Governed AI Development Environment for the Q2 Digital Banking Platform Built with Anthropic’s Claude Code and Amazon Bedrock
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, April 16, 2026--Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: QTWO), a leading provider of digital transformation solutions for financial services, today announced Q2 Code, a governed AI-powered development environment designed to help financial institutions and partners build extensions and integrations on the Q2 Digital Banking Platform faster and with greater confidence.

content.title: Q2 Announces Q2 Code, a Governed AI Development Environment for the Q2 Digital Banking Platform Built with Anthropic’s Claude Code and Amazon Bedrock
content.summary: AUSTIN, Texas, April 16, 2026--Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: QTWO), a leading provider of digital transformation solutions for financial services, today announced Q2 Code, a governed AI-powered development environment designed to help financial institutions and partners build extensions and integrations on the Q2 Digital Banking Platform faster and with greater confidence.

headline: What Has Driven Marvell's 70% Rally?
summary: Marvell (MRVL) stock is up over 70% in two months. The P/E multiple hit 44x at its peak. On trailing earnings, the stock looks expensive. On forward earnings, the picture changes materially.

content.title: What Has Driven Marvell's 70% Rally?
content.summary: Marvell (MRVL) stock is up over 70% in two months. The P/E multiple hit 44x at its peak. On trailing earnings, the stock looks expensive. On forward earnings, the picture changes materially.

headline: Australian Design Startup Canva Avoiding Tech-Sector Layoffs
summary: The design-software developer’s profitability has helped it avoid the large-scale layoffs seen at other tech companies as it builds toward a U.S. stock-market listing, its CEO said.
